description: Italian criminal organization of mafia type originating from Calabria. Recognized as a unitary criminal organization with a collegial leadership by the Italian Supreme Court in 2016. It is the only mafia present on all five continents, with an estimated global turnover of 150 billion euros as of 2022. Its main activity is drug trafficking, followed by involvement in public contracts, vote buying, extortion, usury, arms trafficking, gambling, and toxic waste disposal.

country_links.evidence_quote: Viene individuata in tutto il Sud America : Perù , Cile , Brasile , Argentina , Uruguay , Paraguay , Venezuela e Bolivia .
country_links.context: The 'Ndrangheta is identified throughout South America, including Argentina.

country_links.evidence_quote: Molto forte è la presenza in Australia . , Canada e Germania In Australia , dai proventi dei sequestri nella prima metà del Novecento nasce una fervente attività nella coltivazione di campi di marijuana .
country_links.context: The 'Ndrangheta has a strong presence in Australia, where it cultivated marijuana fields and formed the Siderno Group.

country_links.evidence_quote: Molte 'ndrine infine in Austria e in Svizzera hanno conservato i loro capitali, e, soprattutto in quest'ultima, ci sono stati anche svariati traffici di armi.
country_links.context: The 'Ndrangheta has 'ndrine (clans) in Austria that have preserved their capital.

country_links.context: The 'Ndrangheta has a strong presence in Canada, where the Siderno Group was formed and operated.
